name: Delaware Town Access
facilities: Boat ramp, two parking lots, day-use only, no camping; 24 acres
description: Uppermost MDC access on the floatable main James. ~1.5 mi upstream of the USGS 'James River near Boaz' gauge 07052250 (37.0066,-93.3647).

name: Shelvin Rock Access
facilities: Two parking lots, boat/canoe access for fishing and canoeing, day-use; ~20 acres
description: 2nd of 5 MDC main-stem accesses (N->S: Delaware Town, Shelvin Rock, Hooten Town, H.L. Kerr, Ralph Cox).

name: Hootentown Access
facilities: Boat ramp, large parking lot, day-use only; marks upstream end of the James River special black-bass management area
description: Popular put-in; classic ~9 mi float Hootentown -> Galena. MDC official name 'Hooten Town Access'.

name: H.L. Kerr Access
facilities: Concrete boat ramp, large parking lot, day-use only; 39.2 acres
description: 4th MDC access; ~5 river miles above the Galena/Ralph Cox take-out. Do not confuse with adjacent private outfitter drop-ins.

name: Galena Y-Bridge Access (Ralph Cox Memorial Access)
facilities: ADA concrete boat ramp, privy, large parking lot, day-use
description: The confirmed 'Galena Y-Bridge' take-out IS the MDC Ralph Cox Memorial Access ramp, adjacent to the Galena Y-Bridge and the USGS 07052500 gauge. Southernmost/downstream MDC access before Table Rock Lake backwater.
